summary: Comprehensive security audit and observability testing for Project Centurion iteration 9. All 31 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests confirm admin route protection, auth modal, and dashboard functionality. Scheduler running with 4 habit engine jobs.

issues: Recharts warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - cosmetic issue during initial mount

backend_security: Health endpoint /api/health returns 200 with status 'ok' and supabase 'connected'
Request logging middleware adds X-Request-ID header (8 chars)
Request logging middleware adds X-Response-Time header (e.g., '5.23ms')
frontend: Landing page loads with '100Cr Engine' title
Admin route /admin correctly redirects non-authenticated users to home
Auth modal shows 'Sign in to Centurion' with Google OAuth and Magic Link options
Settings page loads with Profile, Billing, Support tabs
Dashboard sidebar shows all navigation items
habit_engine: checkin_reminder job registered (25th of month 10:00 AM IST)

require_paid_subscription.details: PAID_PLANS includes ['starter', 'founder', 'studio', 'vc_portfolio']. ACTIVE_STATUSES includes ['active', 'trialing']. Properly checks plan, status, and expiration.

payments_webhook.details: Handles starter (30 days), founder (365 days), trial (7 days with 'trialing' status). Calculates expires_at correctly. Uses idempotency check via payment_ref.

checkin_anomaly_trigger.details: Triggers fire_anomaly_alert when revenue drops >10%. Uses BackgroundTasks for async processing.

checkin_streak_update.details: Updates streak_count and last_checkin_at. Increments streak if last checkin within 35 days, resets to 1 otherwise.

admin_protection.details: Uses hashed email comparison via ADMIN_EMAILS env var. Logs all access attempts. Returns 403 for non-admins.

structured_logging.details: StructuredLogger with JSON output, sensitive data masking, MetricsCollector for performance tracking.

request_middleware.details: Adds X-Request-ID (8 char UUID) and X-Response-Time headers. Logs all requests with timing.

frontend_admin_protection.details: Silently redirects non-admins to home (no error message). Checks REACT_APP_ADMIN_EMAILS env var.

action_items: ADMIN_EMAILS environment variable not set in backend/.env - admin endpoints will return 403 even for authenticated users until this is configured
REACT_APP_ADMIN_EMAILS not set in frontend/.env - frontend admin route check will fail
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py require_paid_subscription correctly handles starter/trialing statuses with proper expiration checking
payments.py webhook calculates expires_at correctly for all plan types (starter=30d, founder=365d, trial=7d)
reports.py checkin endpoint triggers anomaly alert on >10% revenue drop via BackgroundTasks
reports.py checkin endpoint updates streak correctly with 35-day window
admin.py uses constant-time hash comparison for admin email verification (prevents timing attacks)
logging_service.py implements comprehensive structured logging with sensitive data masking
main.py middleware adds X-Request-ID and X-Response-Time headers to all responses
ProtectedRoute.jsx silently redirects non-admins without revealing admin route exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All security audit features verified: 1) require_paid_subscription accepts starter/founder/trialing, 2) Payments webhook handles all plan types with correct expires_at, 3) Checkin triggers anomaly alert on >10% drop, 4) Checkin updates streak correctly, 5) Admin endpoints protected with hashed email comparison, 6) Structured logging initialized, 7) Request middleware adds X-Request-ID and X-Response-Time headers, 8) Frontend admin route silently redirects non-admins. Note: ADMIN_EMAILS env var not set.

mocked_api.note: All APIs are live with Supabase.
